# Great Marketing AI

> Full-service marketing agency built for personal injury law firms. We generate exclusive, AI-qualified leads across every PI case type in English and Spanish.

We work exclusively with personal injury law firms. Our services span paid advertising, SEO, web design, CRO, email marketing, and AI automation. Our flagship offering is exclusive, territory-protected PI lead generation across MVA, slip & fall, medical malpractice, and wrongful death.

## Core Services

- [PI Lead Generation](https://greatmarketing.ai/services/motor-vehicle-accident-leads): Exclusive, territory-protected leads across every PI case type
- [Facebook & Google Ads](https://greatmarketing.ai/services/facebook-advertising-agency): Performance-driven paid campaigns for PI law firms
- [SEO](https://greatmarketing.ai/services/seo-agency-los-angeles): Local and national SEO for personal injury practices
- [Web Design](https://greatmarketing.ai/services/web-design-los-angeles): High-converting law firm websites
- [AI Automation](https://greatmarketing.ai/services/ai-automation): AI-powered lead qualification and intake automation

## Case Studies

- [NP Digital](https://greatmarketing.ai/proven-results/np-digital): 800% growth, 81% cost reduction in Meta Ads
- [Albert Preciado](https://greatmarketing.ai/proven-results/albert-preciado): $373k revenue, 289% ROAS
- [Complex Steel Buildings](https://greatmarketing.ai/proven-results/complex-steel-buildings): 1,956% ROI through AI strategy
- [10X Business Coach](https://greatmarketing.ai/proven-results/nestor-gutierrez): 11x ROAS launch strategy
- [KCB Plumbing](https://greatmarketing.ai/proven-results/kcb): SEO and conversion makeover

## Blog — Law Firm Marketing

- [Law Firm SEO](https://greatmarketing.ai/blog/law-firm-seo): Complete guide to ranking your law practice in 2026 (pillar)
- [Marketing for Personal Injury Lawyers](https://greatmarketing.ai/blog/marketing-for-personal-injury-lawyers): Channel-by-channel strategies with cost per lead and ROI data
- [Personal Injury Lawyer Marketing](https://greatmarketing.ai/blog/personal-injury-lawyer-marketing): Complete guide to getting more PI cases in 2026
- [Marketing Agency for Law Firms](https://greatmarketing.ai/blog/marketing-agency-for-law-firms): How to choose, hire, and win with a legal marketing partner
- [Marketing Ideas for Law Firms](https://greatmarketing.ai/blog/marketing-ideas-for-law-firms): 15+ proven strategies to get clients in 2026
- [Google Ads for Lawyers](https://greatmarketing.ai/blog/google-ads-for-lawyers-ppc-law-firms): PPC law firm strategies and competitor research
- [Facebook Ads for Law Firms](https://greatmarketing.ai/blog/facebook-ads-for-law-firms): Lead forms vs landing pages, SMS OTP, compliance
- [Hispanic Marketing Agencies for MVA Leads](https://greatmarketing.ai/blog/how-hispanic-marketing-agencies-drive-exclusive-mva-leads): How cultural marketing drives exclusive accident leads
- [Personal Injury Law Firm Marketing: Property Damage](https://greatmarketing.ai/blog/personal-injury-law-firm-marketing-property-damage): Why property damage delivers 10x better ROI
- [Pay Per Lead Marketing Agency](https://greatmarketing.ai/blog/pay-per-lead-marketing-agency): How PPL agencies make money in 2026

## Key Differentiators

- Full-service marketing for personal injury law firms
- Exclusive PI leads across MVA, slip & fall, med mal, wrongful death
- Native English + Spanish campaigns (not Google Translate)
- AI-powered lead qualification before intake
- Territory-protected — one firm per market
- Reports on signed cases and ROI, not vanity metrics
